superseded_note.decision: 同意能力 5，但我不需要模擬下單，我要算的是分析和股票價值。
superseded_note.effect: Capability 5 reshaped as valuation & analysis; paper trading / simulated order matching returned to deferred_not_approved; broker read-only connector remains a separate unapproved gate.
superseded_note.retention: This evidence and the referenced contract/work-unit draft are retained for audit history only and authorize nothing.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Simulation contract: fill model, fee/slippage assumptions, data inputs, explicit hypothetical statement
prerequisite_alignment.note: Fill rule next_trading_day_open on raw OHLCV; parameterized TW fee/tax/slippage with documented defaults; hypothetical-fills statement explicit.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Credential boundary: storage, scope, revocation; read-only scopes only
prerequisite_alignment.note: Simulation-only slice needs and stores no credentials; any broker connector is a separate subsequent human approval with its own credential boundary.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Order-authority gate: written statement of what the connector may not do, enforced in the command surface
prerequisite_alignment.note: Explicit must-not list (place/amend/cancel real orders, no order route/command/UI control, no order-shaped artifact); enforcement via p4_research_closure.py kept passing.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Test and evidence: deterministic simulation tests against fixtures, audit evidence proving no order route exists, acceptance JSON
prerequisite_alignment.note: Fixture-driven deterministic tests plus no-order-code-path assertions required; this acceptance JSON records scope; work-unit verification includes the P4 audit.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Two independent human approvals: simulation-only first, broker read-only connector second; no combined approval
prerequisite_alignment.note: This contract covers the simulation-only slice only; the broker read-only connector is explicitly out of scope and unapproved.

acceptance_notes: Capability 5 contract is drafted for the simulation-only first slice only, per the 2026-07-22 approval order 3 -> 5 -> 2.
The broker read-only connector remains a separate, independent human approval and is not covered.
Automatic order placement remains prohibited; the contract forbids any order route, order command, order UI control, or order-shaped artifact.
StrategySpec remains not_admitted; the slice deliberately uses single-security explicit rules instead of StrategySpec execution semantics, with the rationale recorded in the contract.
This evidence records a contract and a work-unit draft only; no simulation functionality is implemented. Implementation requires human approval of the work-unit digest.
Capabilities 1, 4, and 6 remain deferred_not_approved; capability 2 remains approved_next pending capability 5 completion.
The approved P4 boundary is unchanged and p4_research_closure.py passes.
